data.description: Soluna Holdings, Inc., a company focused on developing green data centers for high-computing purposes like Bitcoin mining and Artificial Intelligence (AI), recently completed a public offering. data.title: Diodes Inc. to announce Q2 2025 results on August 7. Conference call at 4pm CT. Expected attendees: CEO, CFO, and SVP Sales.
data.description: Diodes Incorporated, a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol DIOD, is set to conduct a conference call on Thursday, August 7th, at 4:00 p.m. Central Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time) to review its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. Present on the call will be Gary Yu, the President and CEO, along with Brett Whitmire, the Chief Financial Officer, and Emily Yang, the Senior VP of Worldwide Sales and Marketing. Further details regarding the results and other relevant information will be shared during the call.

data.title: The Estate of Robert Day at John Moran Auctioneers: Over 700 lots at landmark 2-day sale in LA on July 29-30, 2025.
data.description: The auction for The Estate of Robert Day is set to take place on July 29th and 30th, 2025, starting at 10:00am PDT in Los Angeles. John Moran Auctioneers will be overseeing the sale, which features over 700 unique lots from the collection of a prominent California figure. This two-day event is anticipated to draw significant interest from collectors and enthusiasts.

data.title: Market Veep to exhibit at FABTECH 2025 in Boston, the largest event for metal industry. Visit booth #A3289. #B2B #Marketing #GrowthStrategies
data.description: Head of Marketing at a prominent B2B agency will be presenting growth strategies at FABTECH 2025 in Boston on July 17, 2025. FABTECH is the biggest event in North America for metal forming, fabricating, welding, and finishing. It is a significant platform with high footfall, attracting numerous industry professionals, with expected attendance reaching thousands. Market Veep's involvement in this event signifies their commitment to sharing valuable insights and expertise in the field.

data.title: Toxic coal ash landfill cleanups delayed by 1 year by E.P.A. Utilities have extra time to clean up contaminated water.
data.description: Utilities across the United States have been granted an extension of one year by the Trump administration to develop strategies for the cleanup of polluted waterways. This decision provides more time for utilities to address environmental concerns and implement initiatives to improve water quality.

data.title: Stock market hits new high with Netflix earnings beating late, Taiwan Semi boosts, 5 stocks flash buy signals.
data.description: On Thursday, the stock market reached record highs, propelled by Taiwan Semiconductor's performance and positive economic indicators. Netflix reported earnings that surpassed expectations. Following this news, Dow Jones Futures showed promising signs with Netflix leading the way after the market's surge. Additionally, 5 stocks presented strong buy signals in light of the optimistic market conditions.

data.title: LegalZoom to announce Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 7, 2025 after the market close, for the quarter ended June 30, 2025. Nasdaq: LZ.
data.description: A popular online legal services provider, LegalZoom.com, Inc. (Nasdaq: LZ), headquartered in Mountain View, California, has disclosed plans to release its financial performance for the second quarter concluded on June 30, 2025. The announcement is scheduled to take place on Thursday, August 7, 2025, after the market closes.

data.title: Southwest Airlines to discuss Q2 2025 financial results on July 24, 2025, at 12:30 PM Eastern Time. CEO Bob Jordan will lead the webcast.
data.description: Join Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) for a live webcast of its Q2 2025 financial results on Thursday, July 24, 2025, at 12:30 PM Eastern Time. The webcast will feature Bob Jordan, the President and Chief Executive Officer. This announcement was made in Dallas on July 17, 2025.

data.title: Newcore Gold reports positive voting results at AGM on July 17, 2025. Shareholders approved all resolutions. TSX-V: NCAU, OTCQX: NCAUF.
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC, July 17, 2025 - Newcore Gold Ltd. announced favorable voting outcomes from its AGM on July 17, 2025. Shareholders supported all resolutions in the Notice of Meeting and Information Circular from June 13, 2025. Newcore Gold Ltd., listed as NCAU on TSX-V and NCAUF on OTCQX, expressed satisfaction with the results.

data.title: South Bow extends expiration date for exchange offers related to notes, including ones from Canadian and U.S. infrastructure holdings.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on July 17, 2025, South Bow Corp. (TSX & NYSE: SOBO) disclosed an update regarding the extension of the expiration date for the exchange offers linked to specific notes of South Bow Canadian Infrastructure Holdings Ltd. (Canadian Exchange Offer) and South Bow USA Infrastructure Holdings LLC (U.S. Exchange Offer). The extension provides more time for shareholders to partake in the offers. The Company did not reveal the new expiration date in the announcement.

data.title: Aeries Technology (Nasdaq: AERT) compliant with Nasdaq listing; restored bid price rule, no appeal needed.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Aeries Technology, a renowned company listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol AERT, declared that it has met the minimum bid price rule as per the Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). Consequently, the company is now compliant and will remain listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market without the need for a hearing or appeal. This successful restoration of compliance signifies a positive outcome and resolves the matter conclusively for Aeries Technology.

data.title: Nasdaq seeks to incorporate staking for BlackRock iShares ETH ETF, a move welcomed by financial institutions.
data.description: Traditional financial institutions and asset managers have been eagerly anticipating the inclusion of staking in crypto exchange-traded funds.

data.title: Gulf Air plans to add 18 Boeing 787 Dreamliners to its fleet, with 12 confirmed orders and 6 more optional.
data.description: Today, Boeing (NYSE: BA) and Gulf Air revealed a deal for the acquisition of 12 787 Dreamliner aircraft, with the possibility of adding six more. This strategic move by the Bahrain airline aims to enhance its global connectivity. Upon completion, this agreement would result in a total of 18 aircraft being added to Gulf Air's fleet.

data.title: Christina L. Kushnir, MD, MPH, FACOG named Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for Women's Health.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Las Vegas, Dr. Christina L. Kushnir, MD, MPH, FACOG was recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member for her outstanding leadership in Women's Health and Medical Training. Dr. Kushnir has been acknowledged for her significant contributions to the field.

data.description: In July 17, 2025, the Society of Industrial and Office Realtors® (SIOR), a leading global commercial real estate association for industrial and office brokers, announced the appointment of its officers for the 2025-2026 term at their annual spring conference held in Las Vegas. The newly elected officers will lead the organization in its mission...

data.title: Chemung Financial Corp. (Nasdaq: CHMG) reports $6.5M loss in Q2 2025, compared to $6.0M income in Q1 2025 and $5.0M income in Q2 2024.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Elmira, N.Y., Chemung Financial Corporation, the parent company of Chemung Canal Trust Company, announced a quarterly financial update. They reported a net loss of $6.5 million, equivalent to $1.35 per share, for the second quarter of 2025. This contrasts with the net income figures of $6.0 million ($1.26/share) in the first quarter of 2025 and $5.0 million ($1.05/share) in the second quarter of 2024. The corporation's stock is listed as Nasdaq: CHMG.

data.title: Netflix's Q2 revenue reaches $11.08B, up 16% YoY. Earnings per share at $7.19. UCAN region leads revenue growth at 15%.
data.description: Netflix Inc (NASDAQ: NFLX) announced its second-quarter financial results after the market closed. The company reported revenue of $11.08 billion, marking a 16% increase compared to the previous year and surpassing the estimated $11.04 billion. Earnings per share for the quarter were $7.19, exceeding the consensus estimate of $7.06. Operating margins stood at 34%, higher than the company's own projection. Netflix credited the growth in revenue and margins to an increase in members, higher pricing, and rising advertising revenue. Revenue growth was witnessed across all regions: UCAN reported $4.93 billion (+15%), EMEA $3.54 billion (+18%), LATAM $1.31 billion (+9%), and APAC $1.31 billion (+24%). The UCAN region's 15% growth outperformed the 9% growth in the previous period.

data.title: Weis Markets declares $0.34/share quarterly dividend; record date July 28, 2025; payable on August 11, 2025.
data.description: The Board of Directors of Weis Markets, Inc. (NYSE: WMK) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.34 per share on July 17, 2025. Shareholders as of July 28, 2025, will receive the dividend on August 11, 2025. Weis Markets, established in 1912, is a renowned company in the industry.
